scripts.check: npm run check:lifeplus && npm run check:fitline && npm run check:eqology
scripts.build:lifeplus: node scripts/clean-brand.mjs lifeplus && cross-env ASTRO_BRAND=lifeplus astro build && node scripts/prune-brand-output.mjs lifeplus
scripts.build:fitline: node scripts/clean-brand.mjs fitline && cross-env ASTRO_BRAND=fitline astro build && node scripts/prune-brand-output.mjs fitline
scripts.build:eqology: node scripts/clean-brand.mjs eqology && cross-env ASTRO_BRAND=eqology astro build && node scripts/prune-brand-output.mjs eqology
scripts.build:all: npm run build:lifeplus && npm run build:fitline && npm run build:eqology
